name: Dividend Yield Calculator
description: Free online dividend yield calculator. Enter annual dividend per share and share price to get instant results.
seo_description: Free online dividend yield calculator. Enter annual dividend per share and share price to get instant results. Free, fast and no sign-up required.
example_label: Calculating dividend yield for stock paying $2.80 annual dividend at $62.50 share price.
result_context: The yield_pct of {yield_pct}% shows annual dividend income as percentage of share price.
mistakes: Using trailing dividend without checking for recent cuts or increases
Focusing only on yield without considering total return
desc: Free online dividend yield calculator. Enter annual dividend per share and share price to get instant results.
